title: Adventure and Leisure
description: Provides a comfortable experience for players to enjoy adventure and casual gameplay in a mostly vanilla-style Minecraft.
body:
# Primary core gameplay
Explore architectural structures from around the world.
Grow and eat new crops.
Use a variety of materials to build their own home.
Use existing Enchantment to enhance your power.
## Gameplay introduction
Monsters are enhanced after each player's day until the 100th player's day, encouraging players to take an interest in and study combat-related content during their casual sessions.
There are a lot of missions to choose from, and encouraging players to get rewards for killing monsters doesn't give players no reason to kill them.
No modification of the original customs clearance process.
## Ultimate goal
Play to your 100th player day.
Defeat the Raid for the 100th player day.
## Gameplay correlation

The integration package has 400+ modules, which have multiple planting, decoration, structure, props, small features, optimization modules, and tends to allow players to better and more smooth experience of the original content, and do not feel awkward.

# Author's words
Integration package at the beginning for the author self-made to play, and later more and more content, the author hopes that others can experience the same happiness of the author and do detailed creation.
The style of the package is made in the direction of the original style, after which more new content will be gradually added and the bad areas will be corrected! You are also welcome to propose good gameplay to add to the integration package.
Play if you find problems, please feedback with the author, to improve the play more enjoyable!
# Wait to be done
Complete other quests like explore, build, build, farm and cook, and add more fun quests.
Adjust the loot to make it balanced.
